name: @spunweb/openclaw-better-visual-gateway
description: OpenClaw plugin that enhances the gateway UI with SWCUI embedding, theme alignment, and connection monitoring

scripts.deploy: npm run build && node -e "fs=require('fs');p=require('path');const src='dist';const dst=p.join('..','..','..','extensions','openclaw-better-gateway','dist');fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.cpSync(p.join(src,e),p.join(dst,e),{recursive:true});}fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src','inject.js'),p.join(dst,'inject.js'));console.log('Deployed to extensions. Restart gateway to apply.')"
scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run release -- X.Y.Z');process.exit(1)} const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); pkg.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n'); const plug=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('openclaw.plugin.json','utf8')); plug.version=v; fs.writeFileSync('openclaw.plugin.json',JSON.stringify(plug,null,2)+'\n'); console.log('Updated package.json and openclaw.plugin.json to v'+v);" --

author: ThisIsJeron
